class Pipeline:
    def __init__(self):
        self.stage_results = {}

    def run_preprocessing(self, data):
        cleaned = [remove_nulls(row) for row in data]
        self.stage_results["preprocessing"] = len(cleaned)
        return cleaned

    def run_feature_engineering(self, data):
        features = [extract_features(row) for row in data]
        self.stage_results["features"] = len(features)
        return features

    def run_training(self, data):
        model = train_model(data)
        self.stage_results["model_score"] = model.score()
        return model

def compute_metrics(dataset):
    results = []
    for batch in dataset.batches():
        result = evaluate(batch)
        results.append(result)
    return results
